Contact the Associate Dean's ofﬁce at 301-405-5308 for additional information. The department also maintains a listing of scholarships. Contact the Executive Administrative Assistant in 2104A Plant Sciences, 301-405-4356 for more information.

The Ofﬁce of Student Financial Aid (OSFA) administers all types of federal, state and institutional ﬁnancial assistance programs and, in cooperation with other university ofﬁces, participates in the awarding of scholarships to deserving students. For information, visit http:// ﬁnancialaid.umd.edu.
